title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Johnson & Johnson India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Johnson & Johnson India
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!
